mapper.sql: id, securities_account_id, member_id, stock_code, quantity, reserved_quantity, avg_buy_price, total_buy_amount, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM securities_holdings WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY stock_code ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM securities_holdings WHERE id = #{id} AND quantity = 0 AND reserved_quantity = 0
